changes.before: "We need someone above the road captains before Andorhal," she said.
changes.after: "We need someone above the road captains before Andorhal," Sylvanas said.

changes.before: Sylvanas let the silence sit. She thought the argument settled. She believed Arthas would not turn for a threat he could not yet strike, and Jaina was not ready to concede it—not while there was still a chance to put the whole thing in front of a man with rank enough to move riders and freeze ledgers.
changes.after: Sylvanas let the silence sit. She thought the argument settled. She believed Arthas would not turn for a threat he could not yet strike. Jaina knew it too; the road had simply left them one man with rank enough to move riders and freeze ledgers.
